Lyrics.text:
:,: Haleloia (in- efatra )
Midera an’Andriamanitra
Miderà an’Andriamanitra (in -droa )
Eo amin’ny fitoerany masina :,:
:,: Miderà Azy
Azy (in- efatra )
Eo amin’ny habakabaky ny heriny :,:
:,: Miderà Azy :,:
:,: Ary aoka :,:
’Zay rehetra (in- telo )
Manam-pofon’aina
Samy hidera an’i Jehovah
Haleloia!
